name: Extract Demos
description: Unpack .dem demo files from a zip or rar archive so they can be analyzed. Also accepts a single .dem file directly.

options.name: archive
options.label: Archive File
options.description: Path to archive containing demo files

options.name: output
options.label: Output Folder
options.description: Folder where .dem files will be placed (flat structure)

name: Analyze V2
description: Scan demo files and detect impressive moments like aces, clutches, knife kills, and flick shots. Outputs raw highlight data with extended metadata (flick angles, airborne kills, equipment values).

options.name: demos
options.label: Demos Folder
options.description: Path to folder containing .dem files

options.name: output
options.label: Output Folder
options.description: Output folder for highlights.json

options.name: solo-kills-file
options.label: Solo Kills File
options.description: Optional JSON file with manual solo kill ticks

options.name: client-version
options.label: Expected ClientVersion
options.description: From steam.inf — Steam build the demos were recorded on

options.name: server-version
options.label: Expected ServerVersion
options.description: From steam.inf — must match ClientVersion in practice

options.name: network-protocol
options.label: Expected Demo NetworkProtocol
options.description: From demo header. Leave blank to only verify all demos in the batch agree.

options.name: skip-version-check
options.label: Skip Version Check
options.description: Bypass the game/demo version compatibility check (not recommended)

name: Analyze Postprocess UI
description: Prepare highlights for recording by calculating where to start/stop playback, which parts to speed up, and where to apply slow motion. Run this after Analyze V2.

options.name: highlights
options.label: Highlights File
options.description: Path to highlights.json from analyze-v2

options.name: output
options.label: Output File
options.description: Output file path

name: Analyze (Legacy)
description: Scan demo files and detect highlights with automatic scoring and music mapping. This is the all-in-one analyzer used by the Full Legacy Pipeline -- it handles detection, scoring, and music assignment in a single step.

options.name: reset-music
options.label: Reset Music Mapping
options.description: Discard existing music offsets

name: Record
description: Launch CS:GO via HLAE and automatically record each highlight as a video clip. The game is configured for clean recording (minimal HUD, locked camera, no overlays). Requires HLAE and CS:GO Legacy installed.

options.name: player
options.label: Filter by Player (Steam ID)
options.description: Only record highlights for this player

options.name: id
options.label: Highlight ID
options.description: Record only this specific highlight

options.name: voice
options.label: Record with voice (no HUD)
options.description: Double-pass: record voice audio separately, then clean video without HUD

options.name: keep-voice
options.label: Keep voice file separately
options.description: Save voice audio as a separate file next to the clip (e.g. clip_voice.mp4)

options.name: force
options.label: Force Re-record
options.description: Overwrite existing clips instead of skipping them

options.name: client-version
options.label: Expected ClientVersion
options.description: From steam.inf — Steam build the demos were recorded on

options.name: server-version
options.label: Expected ServerVersion
options.description: From steam.inf — must match ClientVersion in practice

options.name: network-protocol
options.label: Expected Demo NetworkProtocol
options.description: From demo header. Leave blank to only verify all demos in the batch agree.

options.name: skip-version-check
options.label: Skip Version Check
options.description: Bypass the game/demo version compatibility check (not recommended)

name: Postprocess UI
description: Add visual effects to recorded clips: speed up boring gaps between kills, apply slow motion on impressive headshots, and show a player name overlay. Original clips are never modified.

options.name: id
options.label: Highlight ID
options.description: Process only this specific highlight

name: Postprocess Sound
description: Add background music to your processed clips. Each clip gets a unique segment of music with fade in/out. Separate from visual postprocessing so you can fine-tune music without re-rendering effects.

options.name: id
options.label: Highlight ID
options.description: Apply music only to this specific highlight

name: Merge
description: Combine all individual highlight clips into one final video. Optionally add fade transitions between clips.

name: Top Highlights
description: Pick the best highlights from a large set by ranking them with an impressiveness score. Filter by player, highlight type, or minimum kills. Great for building a "best of" compilation.

options.name: asc
options.label: Sort Ascending
options.description: Sort by lowest score first (default: highest first)

options.name: player
options.label: Filter by Steam ID
options.description: Filter by player Steam ID

options.name: player-name
options.label: Filter by Nickname
options.description: Filter by player name (case-insensitive, partial match)

options.name: unique-players
options.label: Max per Player
options.description: Limit highlights per player for variety

name: List Players
description: Show all players who participated in a demo file with their nicknames and Steam IDs. Useful for finding the Steam ID you need for other commands.

options.name: output
options.label: Save to JSON
options.description: Optional: save player list to JSON file

name: Player Kills
description: List every kill by a specific player in a demo -- tick, weapon, headshot, and time gap between kills. Useful for finding tick values to add as manual solo kill highlights.

name: Compress
description: Reduce video file size using FFmpeg. Adjustable compression power from light (barely noticeable) to heavy (much smaller file). Great for sharing on Discord or social media.

options.name: output
options.label: Output File
options.description: Leave empty for auto-naming

name: Timestamps
description: Generate a timestamp list (e.g. "00:00:17 | ACE | de_mirage | PlayerName") for your final video. Copy-paste into a YouTube description to create chapter markers.

name: Resync Music
description: Recalculate music start/end times after you manually edit offsets in music-mapping.json. Use this when you want to skip a song intro or shift music timing for specific clips.

name: Merge Music
description: Concatenate all audio files in a folder into a single track. Useful for preparing a continuous background music file from multiple songs.

options.name: output
options.label: Output File
options.description: Leave empty for auto-naming

name: Apply Music (Timeline)
description: Apply music to clips using the timeline you created in the Music Editor. Gives you precise control over which parts of each song play during each clip.

options.name: mapping
options.label: Timeline Mapping File
options.description: Path to music-timeline.json from Music Editor

options.name: clips
options.label: Clips Folder (override)
options.description: Override clips folder from timeline

options.name: output
options.label: Output Folder
options.description: Output folder for clips with music

options.name: force
options.label: Force Re-apply
options.description: Re-apply music even if already exists
